prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第82名，近年排名稳定在80–84区间，属全国中 上游水平；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及宿舍火灾等校园安全事件，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++等级）；抖音综合 热度排名第11（高热），短视频曝光量大，关注度较高；新闻传播学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校传媒特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。

计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（数字媒体技术、计算机科学与技术、通信工程等）高度契合；新闻传播 学专业社会热度2023年评估为"明显劝退"，但中传作为行业龙头仍具品牌效应；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，较2025年增长约22%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science) were approximately 5298 → 7495 → 6904 → 9203 → 9403, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4100 in the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 9403; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for Physics Category was 22 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 35 in 2025, increasing year by year; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 48, an expansion of about 37% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, easing competition pressure but rankings will still shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 is about 82nd, with stable rankings in the 80–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on application psychology; the reputation for 2025 is slightly positive (Journalism and Communication A++ level); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 11th (high heat), with high short video exposure and attention; Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's media characteristics, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended socially, highly consistent with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Digital Media Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, etc.); the social popularity of Journalism and Communication major was evaluated as 'obviously discouraged' in 2023, but CUC as an industry leader still has brand effect; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 22% compared to 2025, expanding the candidate scale and intensifying overall competition.
7. [Regional Factor] Communication University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is about 1%–2%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment plan by 37% in 2026, the increase in the number of local candidates by about 22%, and the slightly negative university reputation, the expansion of candidate scale further intensifies competition, while the negative reputation slightly offsets; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 11548, with a range of 11048–12048.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11048–12048, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11000), focus on sprinting for flagship majors such as Digital Media Technology and Computer Science and Technology; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 12000), mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors and strive for Tier 2 medium majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 547 → 615 → 1039 → 1055 → 1448, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 900 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1448; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for History Category was 9 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 8 in 2025, with small fluctuations; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 16, a 100% expansion compared to 2025, doubling the enrollment quota, significantly increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; the 2025 reputation is somewhat positive (Journalism and Communication A++ level); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 11th (high heat), with large short video exposure, and media universities continue to attract high attention; Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly matching the university's History Category enrollment majors (Journalism, Communication, Network and New Media, etc.), with prominent disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Communication University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Gansu Province for History Category is very small, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact; the social popularity of Journalism and Communication major was evaluated as 'clearly discouraged' in 2023 (affected by the Zhang Xuefeng incident), but as the industry leader and owner of an A+ discipline, the brand effect remains strong; the social popularity of Chinese Language and Literature major is somewhat hot and recommended; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 22% compared to 2025, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the doubling of enrollment plans for History Category in 2026, the approximately 22% increase in the number of local candidates, and the somewhat negative university reputation, the expansion of the candidate pool further increases competition; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 2347, with a range of 1925–2769.
